steps.title: Substitute the input value
steps.content:
Replace $x$ with $2$ in the function. This keeps the same rule, but evaluates it at the input the question asks for:
$$f(2)=4(2)^3+7$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Compute the power first, then multiply by $4$ and add $7$:
$$f(2)=4(8)+7$$
$$=32+7$$
$$=39$$The answer is 39.
